title: episcia × variabilis
intro: Episcia × variabilis, also known as the variable episcia, is a hybrid plant species within the Gesneriaceae family. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Episcia × variabilis include its antispasmodic and expectorant properties, which help to relieve muscle spasms and promote the removal of mucus from the lungs. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat respiratory and inflammatory conditions.
